name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read
  packages: write

jobs:
  build-and-push:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - run: npm install
      - run: npm run build

      - name: Login to GHCR
        run: echo "${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" | docker login ghcr.io -u vikash9756 --password-stdin

      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t ghcr.io/vikash9756/my-app:latest .

      - name: Push Docker image
        run: docker push ghcr.io/vikash9756/my-app:latest
